summary: Stress breakers are not a recognized concept in modern dentistry; therefore, their avoidance cannot be justified based on available clinical data related to dental treatments like abutment stability or ridge preservation. All referenced information relates to non-dental fields, rendering this query clinically invalid within current practice guidelines.
